messages.body: The Google subscriber you have called is not available. Please leave a message after the tone.
Thank you.

Hello Lori,  It was lovely speaking with you :)  As discussed over our call, I’ve informed my finance team about the cancellation and there will be no charges going forward.   However, as you’ve already made the payment …
Hello Lori,  Let me give you a call in a bit
It’ll only be 5 mins
Ok
I have a client and won't be avaiable until after 3:30 pm.
Do u have time this morning? Soon? Leaving in an hr or so.
Or maybe 12pm (noon) my time.

I'm doing great. Thank you so much for asking. Yes. So, I'm not going to take much of your time because you do have a client. I understand your request to cancel. All right. I just wanted to know if I understand because …
Hello Lori,  Hope you’re doing well!  I was extremely sick and was unavailable. However, I’m back to work today.
I completely understand where you’re coming from.
Can we please set up a call sometime this week so we discuss and take it forward?

Good Morning. I need to know how I notify Zoca that I need to cancel my membership? I can not justify the expense. I think I am just such a niche space and this is not the right marketing fit for my business. Thank You.

There is only one service. It is a 500 Pulse (shockwave/softwave) treatment. The treatment is repeated once a week for 6 weeks. So there is only the consultation visit to evaluate if they are a candidate for the treatmen…
Ok. I like all of those.also Stem Cells
Alright I’ll get these updated 😊
Understood. I’ll inform the team!

Descriptive services? There is not much to say. Its one service.  As far as keywords, i don't know what other ones to use. Its basically a treatment foe anyone whonis suffering from pain. Chronic, a new injury, arthritis…
Yes basically anything related to what services you provide.

I found suggestions, let me know which ones you’d like us to use :   Top money keywords   	• Acoustic wave therapy 	• Shockwave therapy 	• SoftWave therapy 	• Pain relief treatment 	• Non-surgical pain therapy  Problem +…
Thank you
What would you suggest.
Also, we’ve deducted the amount from your new card and we’ve initiated the refund for the old card. The same should be credited to your account in 2-5 business days 👍🏼
Hello Lori,  Can you provide me a list of keywords that you want Google posts around? I’ll get them updated!
Also we suggest you to add more descriptive services. There are no leads coming in due to this. Can we work around this?
Hey Lori,  We can have new patient and existing but can we curate more than 1 service? Right now when any client comes on the website it looks like lack information and it’s causing them to drop off
Can we try to work something around services though?
Hey Lori,  Apologies! I’ll get this updated for you. You may also manually edit posts directly through the Zoca app. Let me know if you need any assistance with the same.

I was just looking at the posts created by Zoca...2 days ago it posted about erectile dysfunction! I said when I first set up my acct with Zoca that although that is something that is treated...I am NOT qualified to do t…
I just found that and did delete it.
Hey Lori,  I’ve already highlighted this to the team. Please allow me one day!
Okay great. I’ve informed my team. Please don’t worry, we will fix this 👍🏼
Did it get fixed?
No worries!
Hello Lori,  Hope you’re doing well!  This isn’t supposed to be happening. Thanks for letting me know. Let me get this checked right away!

GM,.I am just doing my expenses for Oct, and I see that I was charged on my personal card again for Zoca. I updated my card with you, and it should have charged my husiness card ending in 5931. I need this reversed and c…
Great thank you!
I’ll get back to you as soon as I get an update from my finance team

Hey Lori,  It was lovely speaking with you :)   I’ll shortly share the summary of our meeting on your email ID. Please do give me a read.   Also, just text me here whenever you want to schedule our next meeting! :)
I have asked to join the meeting....
GM. Is there a time tomorrow around 12 or 1 that works?
Hello Lori,  Yes, let’s do 12 noon tomorrow. Here’s the link - http://meet.google.com/pxq-hdpu-sns  Looking forward to speaking with you :)
Hello Lori,  Hope you’re doing well!  I’d love to schedule a meeting sometime this week to check on how things are going!   Please let me know what date and time works for you :)

Hi, I hope you’re doing well!  I just wanted to share a quick update — we’re celebrating a major festival here in India, and our team will be on leave from October 18th to 22nd. During this time, I may not be able to sch…
Hey Lori,  You may ignore this. Don’t entertain such messages.
I believe this is a scam...but everyday I am getting a call from Google saying there is a problem with my listing.. i believe it is fine, but can u please confirm. Thank you.
Ok. Please just charge the $163 on the 31st. Then moving forward we will use the 30th for $199.
Perfect! I’ll get it done!

Hey Lori,  I spoke with my management, and we can handle this in one of two ways — we can either issue a $36 refund once this month’s payment is processed, or we can deduct the $36 from your next payment.  Please let me …
We’ll move the date to 31st. If you pay the $199 we’ll refund $36.   Or if you wish to reduce the amount to $163 right now, we’ll do it and this amount will be deducted on 31st
And going forward all payments will be on the 30th of the month

Besides the money, I have had a couple of new clients referred  from previous clients. And I am being patient with waiting for leads here. When I get back next week, I plan to do some in person contacts/marketing. Just n…
I was traveling yesterday and did have an opportunity to get back to you. So I understand. You will refund me $36 AND move the processing date ongoing to the end of the month?
Besides this, how are things going at your end?

This accounting issue is your business issue...not me the customer. I am also guessing that u only mean this month and then Nov 22nd they will want to charge me again. I am not sure why I the cuatomer is having to advoca…
No...that means I paid $36 plus foe NO website/.marketing etc. I practically wrote and furnished all the content for the site etc. So no. This is not acceptable.
As a small businesa just starting out every cent counts!
I apologise, it was a miss from my end personally on moving the payment date and I take complete responsibility for it.
This is  wrong!!! What is happening? If u charge me we are gonna be done!

Hey Lori,  Hope you are well!   You may ignore the same. I spoke to the same we would be able to generate the invoice for 31st October.   So the finance team mentioned we’ll have to do this else there would be no payment…
Lori,  I’m changing your payment schedule to the last day of every month going forward, not just for this month.
Do not worry. These are solvable issues and I’m here to help :)
Understandable! I’ve already highlighted this to my management and I’ll definitely come back with a solution, Lori. Just give me sometime.
Please let me know if 31st is okay for you so I can get this done immediately.
